title: 34 Ave Chess Club
description: Join us at 34 Ave & 93 St for some friendly matches. Pull up a chair, challenge a neighbor, and stay as long as there are players! All ages welcome. Challengers sought. Sponsored by the 34th Avenue Open Streets Coalition and powered by Volunteers.

title: Chess Club for Kids
venue: Queens Public Library at Jackson Heights
description: Join us for Chess Club! Kids are invited to a fun and engaging chess instruction session where they will learn fundamental tactics and strategy for all three facets of the game: opening, middle, and end. This program is funded by New York City Council Member Shekar Krishnan. (718) 899-2500 Get directions to event. AUDIENCE Kids(6-11)

title: Kids’ Night @ The Queensboro
address: 80-02 Northern Blvd, Jackson Heights, NY 11372, USA
description: Every Wednesday: Kids Eat Free at the Queensboro* Free kids’ entree with purchase of adult entree from 4-9pm

title: Visibility Brigade – Jackson Heights
description: The Visibility Brigade aka Rush Hour Resistance was founded in 2020 to provide physical messaging in the real world. We remind everyday people that they are not alone in these unprecedented times. WE PROVIDE THE MESSAGING, YOU JUST NEED TO SHOW UP WITH YOUR PASSION! Please visit https://visibilitybrigade.com for more info. Note: For safety reasons, we do […]

title: Spring Zumba with Leo
description: FREE ZUMBA this Spring at the garden! Come get down with your bad selves with Leo, our amazing Zumba instructor, every Monday and Wednesday in May and June at 6:00 PM. Yes, even on Memorial Day. @leozumbanyc is the best; he keeps you wanting more… Have some fun and get some exercise in the process.

title: Monthly Artist Meetup
description: Join us for a monthly meet up for artists of all disciplines from Queens and the greater NYC area. This is a space to gather and connect – to talk about current and upcoming projects and programs, and ultimately build a network of creative support in Queens. Members of the Flushing Town Hall team will […]

title: LPAC Community Choir Open Rehearsals
address: 45-50 Van Dam St, Long Island City, NY 11101, USA
description: Free community choir rehearsals facilitated by MORE Opera and designed for anyone who wants to sing. The choir will culminate in two public concerts: June 21 at Lowery Plaza in Sunnyside as part of Make Music New York, and July 2 in LPAC’s Little Theater.

title: Shut Up and Write [Astoria, Queens]
address: 28-23 Steinway St, Long Island City, NY 11103, USA
description: One hour of uninterrupted writing, no prompts or unsolicited feedback. We will be meeting at the French Workshop. Find us with the Meetup sign, and sit anywhere. Let’s meet at 6:15ish and start intros and writing by 6:45/50

title: Queens Distance Runners: Jackson Heights Community Run @ Queensboro
description: The Meetup is 6:30PM opposite The Queensboro. We wait until 6:35PM, take our Weekly Photo at the mural, then head off for our beautiful 5K route. Route: Down 34th Avenue to 69th, return and head all the way to PS 149 for 2 loops, returning all the way back on 34th ending at Travers Park […]

title: Queens Upstairs Presents: Devil Wears Prada
description: Step Upstairs into the world of fashion, cocktails, and sharp one-liners for a Devil Wears Prada themed night hosted by Jackson Heights residents Alfonso Quiroz and Mark Anthony Cutolo. Guests can mix, mingle, and sip themed drink specials like the “Cerulean Blue” and the “That’s All” while enjoying music, conversation, and plenty of glamorous energy […]

title: ART Crochet Club! Beginner to Intermediate Friendly Workshop (7+)
address: 84-26 37th Ave, Jackson Heights, New York, 11372, United States
description: Learn the basics of crochet! Practice and graduate to making the pattern of your choice! You’ll leave knowing how to pick your crochet needle, what gauge is, & how to make chains. After you’ve gotten the hand of it, we’ll guide you in picking a project to work on. Every time you come in, continue […]

title: Queens Fiber Crafters Monthly Meetup / grupo de Arte Textil Mensual – All ages / Todas Edades
address: 84-26 37th Ave, Jackson Heights, New York, 11372, United States
description: Queens Fiber Crafters Monthly Meetup to Knit, Crochet, & More In Community This is a monthly in-person gathering of fibers crafters of all types. Come together with a project and knit, sew, embroider, quilt, crochet, and more in a cozy neighborhood art space. Crafters of all ages can join. This is a BYO project space […]

title: Helio Alves Trio | Brazilian Jazz
description: Led by Brazilian pianist Helio Alves, the trio brings together Brazilian rhythm and contemporary jazz with clarity and depth. Rooted in decades of performance and collaboration, Alves shapes a sound that is melodic, grounded, and rhythmically nuanced. 7:30 pm to 8:30 pm (First Set) 9:30 pm to 10:30 pm (Second Set) Admission: $20: Cover at […]
